name: The Golf Forge - West Jordan
about: The Golf Forge is an indoor golf training venue with two locations in South Jordan and West Jordan, Utah. It offers a refined, private environment for golfers seeking a consistent, data-driven practice experience. The facility is equipped with six private simulator bays across two locations, all powered by Foresight Falcon launch monitor technology and FSX Play and FSX Pro software. Access is available through membership tiers (Bronze, Silver, Gold, Corporate) or flexible hour passes (5, 10, 20 hours), with 24/7 availability for members. The venue is designed for focused training, with a quiet, distraction-free atmosphere and realistic hitting surfaces.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced Foresight Falcon launch monitor technology
Consistent practice environment across all bays
Flexible membership and punch card options
Quiet, distraction-free atmosphere for focused training

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced launch monitor system paired with FSX Play and FSX Pro software

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own clubs as no club rentals are mentioned.

faq.answer: No external food or drink is mentioned, suggesting it's not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a time frame for playing 18 holes.

faq.answer: No, the venue is specifically designed for serious golf training and does not mention kid-friendly amenities or programs.
